data.title: Nordea Bank Abp: Managers' transactions - Ek
data.description: Press release: On March 20, 2026 at 16:00 EET in Helsinki, Nordea Bank Abp announced a transaction by Erik Ek, a member of the Nordea Group Leadership Team. Ek acquired a total of 6,571 shares in Nordea Bank Abp. This information was disclosed in compliance with Market Abuse regulations.

data.title: Guardian Metal Celebrates its U.S. Listing on the NYSE American
data.description: Guardian Metal Resources plc, a company concentrating on advancing tungsten projects in Nevada, made its debut on the NYSE American under the ticker symbol "GMTL" (LON:GMET, OTCQX:GMTLF, NYSE A:GMTL). The leadership team members will ring the NYSE American Closing Bell at 4:00 p.m. ET. CEO Oliver Friesen expressed enthusiasm for this milestone for the company as it commences trading on NYSE American.

data.title: TBL Team Boxing League Announces Strategic Partnership with Creator Sports Network (CSN)
data.description: TBL Team Boxing League ("TBL") revealed a significant collaboration on March 20, 2026, with Creator Sports Network ("CSN"), a prominent digital media platform. This partnership aims to enhance digital outreach and introduce innovative fan interactions. The collaboration signifies a strategic move to tap into a wider audience base and revolutionize creator-led experiences in the sports industry.

data.title: AllyGPO and BioCareSD Expand Retina Footprint, Offering Independent Practices a Powerful Alternative for Specialty Drug Management
data.description: Fulfilling the rising need for innovation, flexibility, and retention of retina provider autonomy, a strategic collaboration has been formed between AllyGPO and BioCareSD. This partnership, established in FRISCO, Texas, and TEMPE, Ariz. on March 20, 2026, aims to cater to the growing demand for specialized drug solutions. By joining forces, these mission-driven partners are committed to bringing about meaningful transformations in the specialty drug sector.

data.title: Nordea Bank Abp: Managers' transactions - Risbjerg
data.description: On March 20, 2026 in Helsinki, Finland, Nordea Bank Abp made a stock exchange release regarding Managers' transactions at 16:00 EET. Johanne Daugaard Risbjerg, the Chief Audit Executive, acquired a total of 547 shares in Nordea Bank Abp. This information was disclosed following a notification received by the company.

data.title: Nordea Bank Abp: Managers' transactions - Mella
data.description: In Helsinki on March 20, 2026, Sara Mella, a member of the Nordea Group Leadership Team, acquired a total of 28,231 shares in Nordea Bank Abp as per the notification received following the Market Abuse Regulation guidelines. This transaction falls under Article 19 of the EU Market Abuse Regulation.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow, Indexes Continue Their Slide; Super Micro Crashes, But Dell Rips Higher (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline, continuing the trend of losses seen throughout the week. Super Micro stock also plummeted by 26%. The stock market today witnessed the Dow and other indexes sliding further, while Super Micro faced a significant crash, dropping by a notable percentage. Conversely, Dell's stock surged higher amidst the market turbulence. This live coverage discusses the ongoing developments in the stock market, reflecting the general atmosphere of volatility and fluctuations in stock prices.

data.title: AEP Ohio Partners to Bring $4.2B in New Electric Infrastructure in Appalachian Ohio Without Raising Customer Rates
data.description: In Gahanna, Ohio on March 20, 2026, the U.S. Department of Energy along with SB Energy and AEP Ohio revealed their intentions to make significant investments totaling billions of dollars. These investments are aimed at enhancing advanced digital technologies and energy infrastructure to facilitate the expansion of data centers. The primary goal is to stimulate economic progress in Appalachian Ohio through this initiative.
